response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, hands-on engineer with 15+ years of full-stack experience and a current Staff role at Stripe, but the resume shows no evidence of the core domain this role demands: experimentation platforms, A/B testing, metrics/guardrail design, feature flighting, or statistical analysis. His scale experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby) and craftsmanship focus are real assets, yet there is no track record of architecting cross-team measurement systems or leading multi-workstream initiatives at Principal/IC6 scope, and career history reads as strong senior IC work rather than org-level technical leadership.
strengths: Broad, hands-on production experience across web, mobile, and low-latency backend systems at recognizable companies (Stripe, Shopify, Dunnhumby)
High-scale distributed systems exposure, including microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Strong engineering-quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, open-source tooling, and teaching/mentoring via workshops and courses
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, telemetry/metrics platform, or statistical analysis experience — the core of this role
No evidence of Principal-level scope: architecting systems used across multiple teams or leading multi-workstream, cross-org initiatives
Resume inconsistencies (e.g., 'Founder, Datadog' apparently mislabeling an open-source side project) and a very short current-role tenure

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering fundamentals at scale
Gap between senior IC track record and IC6 leadership scope
